===================
=== 1991-08-12 Cilindro Municipal, Montevideo, Uruguay.txt
===================
===================
===================
Cilindro Municipal
Montevideo, Uruguay
August 12, 1991

This is for my personal dentist in Montevideo, who was there, at this one-time only Uruguay Dylan concert!

But a WARNING must be issued:
this is a tip-of-the-scale must-have, it's below-taste, but then again, it's an above-par-of-interest for any Dylan completist...

This concert happened, although the tape is lousy and impossible to clean up in any program I've encountered, but my hope is it might please a few...

It's incomplete (missing 6 tracks) and "Bill" at monicasdud told me it's the only one available.

Taper: no info
Lineage: as-is from a FLAC DVD-R from a trade

01. New Morning (*)
02. When Did You Leave Heaven? (W. Bullock/R. Whiting)
03. All Along The Watchtower
04. I'll Remember You
05. Gotta Serve Somebody
06. Wiggle Wiggle
07. Maggie's Farm (*)
08. Positively 4th Street (*)
09. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
10. Trail Of The Buffalo (trad. arr. Woody Guthrie) (*)
11. It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (*)
12. Boots Of Spanish Leather
13. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
14. Highway 61 Revisited
15. I Believe In You (*)
16. Everything Is Broken
17. What Good Am I?
18. Ballad Of A Thin Man

NOTE: Tracks marked (*) are missing from this set; 6 tracks altogether

Concert # 338 of The Never-Ending Tour
Concert # 4 of the 1991 Tour of South America
1991 concert # 75

Concert # 54 with the 5th Never-Ending Tour band:
Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar)
John Jackson (guitar)
Tony Garnier (bass)
Ian Wallace (drums)

10 acoustic with Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), John Jackson (guitar)
11-13 acoustic with the band

NOTE: There is no tape in general circulation from this show

* * * Enjoy your Bobby Hobby * * *
===================
===================
===================
